testcase.name: test_case_status_update

failure.message: AssertionError: Status should be on_hold assert None == 'on_hold' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfeb75f197900>('status') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfeb75f197900> = {'message': 'Case updated'}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ui_improvements.py:190: in test_case_status_update assert updated_case.get("status") == new_status, f"Status should be {new_status}" E AssertionError: Status should be on_hold E assert None == 'on_hold' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfeb75f197900>('status') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfeb75f197900> = {'message': 'Case updated'}.get

testcase.name: test_case_crud_operations
